case_title: KENNETH W LARSON VS. DARREN STREILER

docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 6/22/11 TO DARREN STREILER
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT STREILER, DARREN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-22-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY LARSON, KENNETH W AS TO DEFENDANT STREILER, DARREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LARSON, KENNETH W RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STREILER, DARREN $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
